---
title: "YourPackage.jl"
description: "One sentence on what the package does."
categories: [distributions]
---

<!--
Copy this file to packages/<yourpackage>.qmd to add a package to the site.
Delete these comments. Keep the front matter fields above:
  title        the package name (shown on the card and page)
  description  one sentence (shown on the card)
  categories   one or more tags (shown as chips, drive filtering)
-->

A short paragraph on what the package is for and how it fits the ecosystem.

## Install

```julia
using Pkg
Pkg.add("YourPackage")
```

## Links

- [Documentation](../docs.html?pkg=YourPackage.jl)
- [GitHub](https://github.com/EpiAware/YourPackage.jl)
